reason: Backend scope and spec index — entry point for windows-agent + orchestrator changes.
event_type registry contract — adding cookie_expired_for_<platform> requires updating this spec; also documents AgentEvent / AgentSnapshot / orchestrator dispatch invariants.
Required coding patterns, forbidden patterns, and test-coverage expectations for backend changes.
Error classification conventions — guides how the inferential cookie-expired detection paths should integrate with existing reason taxonomy.
Structured logging conventions — applies to the new agent + orchestrator log lines that accompany cookie_expired events.
